mapper.insert: insert into advisor_product_draft (product_id, base_info_json, params_json, updated_by) values (#{productId}, #{baseInfoJson}, #{paramsJson}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: update advisor_product_draft set base_info_json = #{baseInfoJson}, params_json = #{paramsJson}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() where product_id = #{productId}
